addTo.label: Add base plate to
addTo.tooltip: Add a base plate to supported, or all, parts.

engraved.label: Add build name to base plate
engraved.tooltip: Add the build name and XYZ resolution in µm onto the base plate.

meshShape.label: Mesh shape
meshShape.tooltip: Selecting a shape other than None will add a pattern of holes in the base plate of the selected shape.

meshSize.label: Mesh size
meshSize.tooltip: The diameter of holes in the base plate.

meshWidth.label: Mesh width
meshWidth.tooltip: Thickness of walls between the holes.

placement.label: Placement
placement.tooltip:
The placement of the base plate relative to each part and it's supports.
  • Underneath - shift parts and supports up, and place build plate underneath.
  • Intersecting - intersect the build plate with the bottom of the part or it's support.

type.label: Type
type.tooltip:
Base plate type:
  • Full - cover the whole platform with a base plate
  • Shadow - cover regions directly below parts.
  • Bounding Box - cover the bounding of each part.

message.changesApplyToNewParts: Existing parts will be updated with the new template settings and requeued for printing.
message.deleteTemplateWarning: Any parts using this template will be returned to the Inbox for review. Assign a new template to print them, or reject them to remove from the Funnel.
message.modifyWillAffectParts: Associated part types using this template will be requeued for printing and any removed part types will be returned to the Inbox for review.
message.modifyWillRequeueParts: Existing parts will be updated with the new template settings and requeued for printing.
message.noTemplatesInfo: Templates will be listed here. Use the 'Create' button to create your first template.

accuracyZ.label: Accuracy Z
accuracyZ.tooltip: The slice thickness used to autogenerate structures and avoid intersection with the part.

aspectRatio.label: Aspect ratio
aspectRatio.tooltip: Controls the widening rate of support structures.

connectGap.label: Connect gap
connectGap.tooltip: Number of lattice levels to suppress connection after a vertical connection was found (available).

connection.label: Connection
connection.tooltip: Number of nodes to connect on the lattice level below. Setting this value to 0 will create flexible supports.

contactWidth.label: Contact width
contactWidth.tooltip:
For default supports: Width of support structure as it contacts the part.

For lattice supports: Width of contact ball as it contacts the part.

halfContactWidth.label: Half contact width
halfContactWidth.tooltip: Retry adding contact points with half the width.

heightLevel.label: Height level
heightLevel.tooltip: Apply a Z-margin between the parts and the platform.

islandWidth.label: Island width
islandWidth.tooltip:
For default supports: Width of support structure upon first contact with the part.

For lattice supports: Width of contact ball upon first contact for each part body.

lattice.label: Lattice
lattice.tooltip: Enable lattice supports. Lattice supports generate an interconnected network of supporting beams around the model.

layout.label: Layout
layout.tooltip: How nodes are spread over XY positions.

margin.label: Margin
margin.tooltip: Additional collision avoidance distance from the part.

maximumWidth.label: Maximum width
maximumWidth.tooltip: Limits the width of support structures at the base.

minimumHeight.label: Minimum height
minimumHeight.tooltip: Avoid adding re-intersecting supports if their height is less than the specified height.

modelInterSupport.label: Model intersupport
modelInterSupport.tooltip: Allow support columns that will reintersect and stand on the part.

selfSupportAngle.label: Self-support angle
selfSupportAngle.tooltip: The angle in degrees from horizontal that does not require supports.

sideFaces.label: Side faces
sideFaces.tooltip: Defines the number of side faces for new support structures.

sideFeaturesSize.label: Side-feature size
sideFeaturesSize.tooltip: The distance a detail can protrude from a surface without being supported.

spacingXY.label: Spacing XY
spacingXY.tooltip: Distance between nodes over XY plane

spacingZ.label: Spacing Z
spacingZ.tooltip: Distance between lattice levels over Z axis.

supportSpacing.label: Support spacing
supportSpacing.tooltip: Distance between support points of on a part.

tallestSupport.label: Tallest support
tallestSupport.tooltip: Ignore any supportable feature above the specified height.

undershoot.label: Under/Over-shoot
undershoot.tooltip:
For default supports: The maximum injected distance where the support point enters the part.

For lattice supports: Distance from contact point where the structure begins to taper to a point.

title.deleteTemplate_one: {{count}} part will be returned to the inbox
title.deleteTemplate_other: {{count}} parts will be returned to the inbox
title.modifyWillAffectParts: Parts might be affected by this change
title.modifyWillAffectParts_zero: Parts might be affected by this change
title.modifyWillAffectParts_one: {{count}} part will be affected by this change
title.modifyWillAffectParts_other: {{count}} parts will be affected by this change

tooltip.defaultPartType: Make this the default template for the selected part type
tooltip.defaultPartType_disabled: This is currently the default template for {{partType}}. Select another template as default to replace it.
tooltip.defaultPartType_only: This is the default template as no other template is associated with this part type
tooltip.fastPrintMode:
<bold>Fast print mode</bold>
Accelerates all non-essential build platform movements, quickly repositioning between layers to minimise idle time and shorten total print duration.
tooltip.separationDetect:
<bold>Separation detect</bold>
Detects film release, reducing lift distance between layers.

May risk print defects if separation isn't properly sensed.
